features: LIGHTWEIGHT: This magnifying glass has a lightweight plastic body and 100mm (4") lens, giving x3 magnification

description: From the manufacturer Amtech S2915 Magnifying Glass Lightweight plastic body Lens diameter approx 4″ (100mm) Magnifying ratio x3 About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
